it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server.ClientHandler

Description
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server

  • Uses of ClientHandler in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server that return types with arguments of type ClientHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<ClientHandler>
    MatchSession.snapshotChannels()
    Snapshot of all currently bound client handlers — used by the RMI liveness probe.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server with parameters of type ClientHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MatchSession.handleAbandonRecovered(ClientHandler channel)
    Tears down a suspended match because a reconnecting player chose "Leave this match" instead of resuming it.
    void
    MatchSession.handleAddPlayer(AddPlayerToLobbyRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    Handles a lobby-join request (routed to a reconnect if the match is crash-recovered).
    void
    MatchSession.handleChooseTotem(ChooseTotemRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    Pre-game totem pick.
    void
    MatchSession.handleDisconnect(String nickname, ClientHandler channel, boolean transportDrop)
    Handles both a voluntary leave (transportDrop=false) and a transport drop (transportDrop=true).
    void
    MatchSession.handleHostCreateAndSetup(String hostNickname, int expectedPlayers, ClientHandler channel)
    Coalesces "host joins + expected players set" into a single broadcast.
    void
    MatchSession.handlePickBonusCard(PickBonusCardRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    Handles an end-of-round bonus-card pick.
    void
    MatchSession.handlePickCards(PickCardsRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    Handles a card-pick move.
    void
    MatchSession.handlePlaceTotem(PlaceTotemRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    All three move handlers wrap the controller call in a VirtualView batch: a single move typically triggers 5-6 model notifications (state, active player, era, scoring...) and we want to coalesce them into one broadcast.
    void
    MatchSession.handleReconnect(ReconnectRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    Resumes a suspended match for a reconnecting player.
    void
    MatchSession.handleRemoveFromLobby(RemovePlayerFromLobbyRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    Handles a player voluntarily leaving the lobby.
    void
    MatchManager.handleRequest(ClientRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    Entry point for every incoming client request: dispatches it through the visitor, turning any failure into an ErrorMessage for the caller.
    void
    MatchSession.handleSetExpectedPlayers(SetExpectedPlayersRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    Handles the host's request to change the expected player count.
    void
    MatchManager.handleTransportDrop(ClientHandler channel)
    Called by the transports when the underlying connection drops without a DisconnectPlayerRequest (closed socket, RMI unreachable).

  • Uses of ClientHandler in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server that implement ClientHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    AsyncClientHandler
    Decorates a ClientHandler so AsyncClientHandler.send(ServerMessage) returns immediately — the actual delivery happens on a per-channel single-thread executor.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server that return ClientHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClientHandler
    AsyncClientHandler.unwrap()
    The underlying handler, for transport-specific operations (e.g.
    Constructors in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server with parameters of type ClientHandler
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AsyncClientHandler(ClientHandler delegate, String name)
     

  • Uses of ClientHandler in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server.rmi

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server.rmi that implement ClientHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    RmiClientHandler
    ClientHandler backed by an RMI callback: every send is a remote receive() call.

  • Uses of ClientHandler in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server.socket

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server.socket that implement ClientHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SocketClientHandler
    Both ClientHandler (synchronized send via ObjectOutputStream) and Runnable (read loop for incoming ClientRequests).

    void
    VirtualView.bindOrReplace(String nickname, ClientHandler channel)
    Binds the nickname to the channel, replacing any previous binding (idempotent, case-insensitive).
